18.sourceTitle: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - 44mm Black
18.evidenceText: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - 44mm Black; Utilizes Clik Valves for best-in-class performance
18.extractionRationale: One distinct third-party accessory product (Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit) is explicitly identified as designed for Clik Valve compatibility in the provided evidence.

37.sourceTitle: CoreCap Valve Cap Set - BBB Cycling
37.evidenceText: Spare parts section mentioned on page but specific SKU list not provided in available content
37.extractionRationale: The source page indicates a "Spare parts" section exists, but the actual list of distinct replacement SKUs (valve cores, seals, o-rings, replacement kits) is not included in the provided content snippet. Without the complete spare parts listing, an accurate count cannot be determined from the available evidence.

45.evidenceText: DT Swiss promotes their own proprietary "DT Swiss tubeless valve" that "perfectly matches DT Swiss rims." No mention of Clik valve adoption. Hunt wheelsets include "a valve fitted" without specifying Clik. No evidence of Clik adoption by any major brand (DT Swiss, Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval).
45.extractionRationale: The available evidence shows DT Swiss actively uses proprietary valves, Hunt's valve type is unspecified, and no information exists for the other four major brands. Zero brands explicitly identified as having adopted Clik as standard. Percentage of major brands converted = 0 out of 6 potential brands = 0%.

57.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Ventilkern - blau | 2 Stück - BIKE24

57.extractionRationale: The provided content does not contain any information about current availability status, stock status, "back in stock" dates, or restock turnaround times. Without such information, the restock turnaround time cannot be determined from the available evidence.
